{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Mirage<br>Categories}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Atrahasis
|class_id=22844
|rank=SSS
|affct=FTH
|source=Daily Relic Album I #61
|description=Atrahasis tells a series of stories about the gods deciding to destroy humanity with a flood, but the hero Atrahasis saves them. This epic not only reflects ancient people's fear and explanation of natural disasters but also demonstrates their understanding of the relationship between gods and humans. The story of Atrahasis is reflected in flood myths across multiple ancient civilizations, indicating the universality and importance ofThis theme in ancient Near Eastern culture.
|fame=55
|art=78
|fth=107
|civ=58
|tech=64
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>All minion skins DEF +10%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail RUSH +9<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>All minion skins DEF +20%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail RUSH +12<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>All minion skins DEF +30%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail RUSH +15<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>All minion skins DEF +50%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail RUSH +21<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>All minion skins DEF +70%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail RUSH +27<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>All minion skins DEF +100%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail RUSH +36<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>All minion skins DEF +100%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail RUSH +36<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60<br>Snail RUSH +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: Medal Output +30
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's FTH +15
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Blue Reagent Drops +6%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=?|reward=?
|3name=|3rec=|3atk=|3def=|3hp=|3weak=
|4name=|4rec=|4atk=|4def=|4hp=|4weak=
|5name=|5rec=|5atk=|5def=|5hp=|5weak=
|6name=|6rec=|6atk=|6def=|6hp=|6weak=
|Arec=|Aatk=|Adef=|Ahp=|Aweak=
}}
}}
